title: Fallen Paladins and Priests [More Magic Series]
description: Heal your allies and pursuit your dark ambitions!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- AzureLib Armor
- Runes
- Spell Engine
### Strongly recommended
- Better Combat for proper weapon mechanics
- Paladins & Priests: what is darkness whitout a light to conquer it? Go and check out is amazing work!
# ✨ Features
This mod 2 new playable classes to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

### Fallen Paladin & Fallen Priest Spell Books
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Fallen Paladin spells, create the Fallen Paladin Scriptures on the Spell Binding Table! (Use any melee weapon ot cast spells from the equipped Fallen Paladin Scriptures!)

To unlock Fallen Priest spells, create the Unholy Book on the Spell Binding Table! (Use Unholy Staves ot cast spells from the equipped Unholy Book!)

### Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, fallen paladin and fallen priest equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage and healing.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/290446d3f18afbe029091ea1e2bfc1e9273dcf5b.png)

Fallen paladins: new 2 armor sets, Contorted claymores, Battle axes, Halberds.

Fallen priests: new 2 armor sets, Unholy Staves.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/fallen_paladins_and_priests/item_v3


**Effect bonuses:**
- config/fallen_paladins_and_priests/effects
